name: Maggie Hassan
subject: History made
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Tonight, I was thrilled to watch Hillary Clinton break a high, hard glass ceiling and accept the Democratic nomination for President of the United States.
I believe that when we include more people in our shared success, we thrive as a country, and that includes electing more women to office. This historic moment is just another reminder of that truth.
I have always strived to make inclusion and opportunity a reality in New Hampshire -- from protecting women's access to health care to fostering innovation and education to leading the charge for marriage equality. I'm with Hillary because she is fighting for that same principle and those same priorities.
This stands in stark contrast to the agenda Donald Trump and Senator Ayotte are pushing -- they want to defund Planned Parenthood, overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , obstruct the Supreme Court confirmation process, and pull our country backward.
The stakes in this election up and down the ballot are incredibly important, so I hope you'll stand with me and commit to voting for Hillary and other progressive champions in November. **[Put your name down to say you'll help make history by electing the first woman president and rejecting the Trump/Ayotte agenda at every level of government.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd68a/2a380d31/10859262/fb3ccd/1661587486/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20160728_MWH_HRC?source=e20160728_HRC_full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Marco Rubio
subject: FWD: catastrophic...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
If Republicans lose control of the Senate it would be catastrophic for our nation. |

Friend - I am concerned.

I am concerned that if we don't reach our fundraising deadline before the end of July, not only will we come up short in November and lose the Republican Majority in the Senate; but also I am afraid the vital battleground state of Florida will swing in Hillary Clinton's favor.

The Democrats in Florida and Washington know the key to the Senate and White House is Florida. Just look what former DNC Chair and Florida Democrat Debbie Wasserman Shultz said: _**"We are the state that will deliver the White House to make sure that we can continue to make the progress that we have been able to make under Barack Obama for the last eight years."**_

Democrats are determined to bury Florida with millions in liberal dollars to elect another Liberal-Democrat to the United States Senate and deliver Florida for Hillary Clinton. **[Friend, will you step-up to make sure that doesn't happen?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)**

There isn't much time left before my last monthly deadline before our August primary. I am counting on you to help me fight back against the Obama-Clinton machine that will deploy to Florida in the upcoming weeks. **[Please chip in $25 or $250 before the end of July, this Sunday night.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)**

Friend, this is going to be a tough battle for Florida, but with your help, I know we will win!

Marco

* * *
**From:** Marco Rubio
**Date:** Tuesday, July 26 2016
**Subject:** catastrophic...

---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)
---
Friend - We can't lose.

**_If Republicans lose control of the Senate it would be catastrophic for our nation, and it all hangs on what happens here in Florida this November_.** If my Democratic opponent were to defeat me, it would mean a Senate stacked with liberal democrats like Elizabeth Warren, Cory Booker, Al Franken, _and my opponent_.

**_Can you imagine the damage they could and would do to our nation if they gained control?_**

I need your immediate support to make certain he doesn't defeat me this fall. Since announcing my campaign just one month ago, I've seen a lot of support but I'm at a disadvantage. My opponent has been running his campaign for over a year and raising money for just as long. **[But with your support today, we can overcome a late start to this race.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)**

My opponents have had months to campaign and fundraise for this race: **I've had a little over a month.** And with our primary election in August, we have to play catch-up.

In just 6 days, we will face our last end of month deadline before our August primary election. With the primary coupled with early voting starting soon, there is no time waste. **[Can I count on your support before the end of July- $25 or even $250 before Sunday night?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)**

The fight to keep the Republican Majority in the United States Senate rests on the backs of Florida voters. I know this is a big responsibility. When I made the decision to run for re-election, I didn't make it lightly and I knew we would face an uphill battle. _But, Friend, the important things in life are hardly easily won..._

**[Now is our time to show the strength of our campaign, but I need you to continue to build the momentum here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36715338:WJwQaeYNs:m:1:1328517760:130CFD2DF563260C336DBD843E85D470:r)**

Just 35 days ago, I announced that I was running for re-election. In little over a month, Team Marco has built the momentum not only to win the primary election in August, but also to win in November and keep the Senate Majority in the hands of conservatives.

subject: Link of the Week: NH woman speaks at DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about._
Granite State mother and grandmother Pam Livengood spoke powerfully about our country's opioid crisis at the Democratic National Convention on Monday. After talking about her daughter's struggle with addiction, she said these important words:
_"My story isn't unique -- this epidemic has devastated communities all over the country. It doesn't discriminate against age, race, gender, or income. It affects all of us, but sometimes it feels like folks in Washington don't hear these stories."_

[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd68b/2a380d31/107a8081/fb3d65/3932805917/VEsH/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l6maZOaX2IY")

| Peter,

I know we're both pressed for time -- so I'll keep this short.

**Here's the situation: we've just learned that my liberal opponent has broken Democrat fundraising records for the third time in a row -- raising over 1 million dollars in the campaign to defeat me. **

That is just the start because Nancy Pelosi and the National Democrat campaign machine rapidly raising more. For the Democrats, _defeating me means that they will be able to win back control of Congress._

But it gets worse. **I'm short of my must-hit, end of the month fundraising goal by more than $15,326.** The deadline is in less than 72 hours.

If we're going keep Congress in Republican hands...we have to act fast!

I'm emailing you personally today because you're one of my most trusted supporters -- [**can you help me reach my goal and ensure that I can fight back by making an emergency contribution of $25 right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36724137:sPsxmSYUN:m:1:1320601823:152ACE8D38A26723A1D0E9CCD44D5FA8:r)

The Democrats are determined to win back control of Congress, and that means they're desperate to win my seat. Now, they're bank rolling my opponent because -- and I hate to say it -- **winning my seat may very well determine which party controls Congress.**

[** I've got your back with: $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36724138:sPsxmSYUN:m:1:1320601823:152ACE8D38A26723A1D0E9CCD44D5FA8:r)

[** I've got your back with: $250 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36724141:sPsxmSYUN:m:1:1320601823:152ACE8D38A26723A1D0E9CCD44D5FA8:r)

[** I've got your back with: $1,000 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36724142:sPsxmSYUN:m:1:1320601823:152ACE8D38A26723A1D0E9CCD44D5FA8:r)
In my 23 years as a Navy SEAL failure was never an option. And I'm not ready to start today.

That is why I'm coming to you now, before it's too late.

[ **Will you have my back in this fight?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36724137:sPsxmSYUN:m:1:1320601823:152ACE8D38A26723A1D0E9CCD44D5FA8:r)

Friend -- I'm Emily, Evan's finance director in his campaign for U.S. Senate.

Yesterday, we put out a call for support in reaching our $30,000 end-of-month goal. It's the first big goal of the campaign, so it's very important we hit it.

**But I 'm looking at the contributions coming in, and I'm worried that we're not on track.** We don't have much time to catch up -- the deadline is at midnight on Sunday.

**[Friend, will you chip in now to elect Evan Bayh to the Senate?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50427/7be36b49/1ed362b3/78f8c2b0/1001376295/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-julyeom?refcode=20160729&amount=25")**

Evan is a proven leader who has always put the needs of Hoosiers first. He's not interested in partisan games -- he's interested in finding common ground and getting things done. Long story short, he's who we need representing us in the Senate.

But we can't get him there unless everyone pitches in. And let's not forget, **the Koch brothers are already attacking Evan** and propping up his opponent Todd Young.

That makes your support before Sunday even more critical. **[Will you pitch in whatever you can to help Evan win?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50427/7be36b49/1ed362b3/78f8c2b0/1001376295/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-julyeom?refcode=20160729&amount=25")**

Democrats are fired up and ready to work--and win--across the country this fall! Last night, I was on the floor when Hillary Clinton accepted our party's nomination. Earlier in the week, the passion of Michelle Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders inspired us all. I've supported Bernie Sanders for a while. I admire his vision and his dedication to speaking the truth. He embodies a lot of the values that matter most to me personally -- courage, integrity, a ferocious work ethic, and a commitment to equality. My decision not to take any corporate money for my campaign was directly inspired by him. **[If you agree that we need to get big money out of politics, chip in $30 now to help us beat corporate money right here in Utah!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1720528987420947712/967095236675439360?am=30&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Bernie has done amazing things for our party, and his endorsement of Hillary Clinton represents an important step towards a better America. We can't hope to win or make change on the issues we all care about without unity, and I continue to admire Bernie for contributing so much to that unity. For me, it's more than just "never Trump." I choose to support Hillary as the nominee because of her undeniable leadership qualities, her dedication to public service, and her courage to keep breaking glass ceilings. The big takeaway from the 2016 DNC for me was simple: we are in this together. There are millions of people across America dedicated to finding sensible and inclusive solutions to our shared challenges. As Democrats, even in Utah, we are all part of something bigger. The time is now for us to come together, organize smarter, and work harder than ever before! Let's keep the movement for a more progressive, democratic Utah going! | Friend,

What a contrast between Philadelphia and Cleveland! While Donald Trump presented a bleak, dark and foreboding view of America, Hillary Clinton, President Obama, Bernie Sanders and Democrats nationwide united behind a positive, optimistic vision for a brighter future.

But we know that vision without action cannot move our nation forward. But in addition to rallying our ground troops and knocking on doors, we must have the resources to win the battle over the airwaves. And in the age of Citizens United, we must be prepared to fight back against outside SuperPacs that can spend millions against us at the last minute.

That's why we cannot afford to let our guard down and that's why I still need you. **[Will you chip in $25 right now to keep us on a strong course to victory in November and show big outside special interests that we're prepared to do whatever it takes to keep this Senate seat blue and help retire Mitch McConnell in November?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a7c/70cdc2ba/47043952/3971657/993266928/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-july-turnsenateblue?refcode=em072916_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+25+right+now+to+keep+us&utm_campaign=em072916_1&source=em072916_1")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Chambers=2C=20EricGreitens.com?=
subject: Obama Political Machine Attacks Eric Greitens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary

By Maggie Severns, POLITICO
7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST

A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field.

Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman.

"What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it."

Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent.

Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points.

The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary.

The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election.

Chip in now to help us fight back (https://donate.ericgreitens.com?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=c37b52c2a5-7.25+Ad&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-c37b52c2a5-99411629)

clean_body: Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary By Maggie Severns, POLITICO 7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field. Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment. The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman. "What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it." Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent. Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points. The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary. The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election. clean_body: We did it. | Peter, Let’s do it! This week, Hillary officially accepted the Democratic nomination. Hillary did it. We did it. Peter, you helped put another crack in that glass ceiling. I’m PUMPED, because Hillary is the champion that so many Americans need. She’s been fighting the good fight since before I was born, and she’s never going to quit. But Peter, we can’t stop fighting for her now that she has the nomination -- we’re on to the main event, and we’re only getting started. The work begins now -- we’re staring down an FEC fundraising deadline on Sunday and we need to show up big. Please believe that we’re going to do everything we can to stop Trump. We’re on the ground in all 50 states to elect Democrats across the country -- our organizers and volunteers will talk to every potential Hillary voter about how we’re going to break down the barriers that hold Americans back, and how Hillary is the champion we need in the White House. And it’s not just about us, either. Organizers are building relationships and working with community leaders and volunteers to build infrastructure that can last past November. That’s how we’ll get ourselves a Democratic Congress one day, too. When you chip in today, you’re helping us put our plan into motion. If you wait until October to step up, it may be too late. body:
| Did you see Chris's email, friend? We cannot afford to let our guard down, especially now. On Sunday we'll officially be 100 days away from Election Day and we have a lot of work to do. **[Please chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to keep us on a strong course to victory in November!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a78/70cdc2ba/47034150/3971684/1254719985/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-july-turnsenateblue?refcode=em072916_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can+ri&utm_campaign=em072916_2&source=em072916_2")**

Begin Forwarded Message:

Friend,

What a contrast between Philadelphia and Cleveland! While Donald Trump presented a bleak, dark and foreboding view of America, Hillary Clinton, President Obama, Bernie Sanders and Democrats nationwide united behind a positive, optimistic vision for a brighter future.

But we know that vision without action cannot move our nation forward. In order to enact policies to confront income inequality, stop climate change, reform our criminal justice system and fix our broken campaign finance system we need to win elections -- and we must win more than the White House. We must also win a majority in the Senate and seize the moment to make major gains in Congress. That's why we have already knocked on thousands of doors and made thousands more phone calls to educate voters about the stakes in this election.

But in addition to rallying our ground troops and knocking on doors, we must have the resources to win the battle over the airwaves. And in the age of Citizens United, we must be prepared to fight back against outside SuperPacs that can spend millions against us at the last minute.

That's why we cannot afford to let our guard down and that's why I still need you. **[Will you chip in $25 right now to keep us on a strong course to victory in November and show big outside special interests that we're prepared to do whatever it takes to keep this Senate seat blue and help retire Mitch McConnell in November?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a78/70cdc2ba/47034150/3971685/1254719985/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-july-turnsenateblue?refcode=em072916_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+25+right+now+to+keep+us&utm_campaign=em072916_2&source=em072916_2")**

**[Please use this personalized link to give whatever you can right away>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a78/70cdc2ba/47034150/3971682/1254719985/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-july-turnsenateblue?refcode=em072916_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+use+this+personalized+link+to+giv&utm_campaign=em072916_2&source=em072916_2")**

Thank you for being a part of this. We couldn't do it without you.

Chris
>
---
